completion_summary: Formal RL task bundles now include the canonical observation contract; checkpoint binding accepts only manifest 0.3 with an exact task-specific observation hash and exposes the digest to method freeze. Missing semantics fail before checkpoint use; focused formal/method/observation/replay suite passed.
scope: Require the canonical task-specific observation contract hash in formal RL checkpoint binding and expose it in the public method-freeze summary, without modifying the SAC-owned training runner.
